name: Peking Beef (Mongolian Beef)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Green onion, green part only
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef, egg white, salt, and 1 tablespoon cornstarch in a bowl. Mix well by hand.
2. Heat oil to 400°F (200°C) and deep fry beef for 30 seconds. Drain excess oil.
3. Reheat 4 cups of oil to 375°F (190°C) in a wok. Stir-fry bamboo shoots and scallions for 1 minute.
4. Combine sauce ingredients in a separate bowl, then add the vegetables. Bring mixture to a boil.
5. Add beef to the boiling sauce and stir fry quickly until heated through.
Note: Also known as Mongolian Beef.
